title: scabiosa pratensis var. glabrata
intro: Scabiosa pratensis var. glabrata, also known as the smooth field scabious, is a plant species within the genus Scabiosa, which is a type of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Scabiosa pratensis var. glabrata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and can also be dried and used as a herbal powder or tincture.
